sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: 5 big analyst AI moves: Palo Alto and Reddit get fresh Buy calls, AMD upgraded
feed.summary: This article details several significant analyst moves in the AI sector, highlighting new "Buy" ratings for Palo Alto Networks and Reddit, and an upgrade for AMD. Analysts are optimistic about these companies due to factors like strong AI demand, cybersecurity platformization, a structural increase in CPU demand, and Reddit's unique position as a data source for AI models. The article also mentions Intel's strong Q1 results driven by agentic AI.

feed.title: Axon Enterprise Inc. stock (US05464C1018): Why Google Discover changes matter more now
feed.summary: Google's 2026 Discover Core Update significantly changes how investors access information on stocks like Axon Enterprise Inc. (AXON), prioritizing personalized, mobile-first content based on user activity. This shift delivers tailored insights on public safety tech trends directly to Google app feeds, enabling faster decision-making for retail investors. The update emphasizes high-quality, E-E-A-T content, making Axon's hardware and SaaS business model more discoverable and amplifying its visibility in a growing market.

feed.title: Northern Trust Corp. stock (US6658591044): Why Google Discover changes matter more now
feed.summary: Google's 2026 Discover Core Update is significantly changing how investors receive news about Northern Trust Corp. stock (US6658591044) on mobile devices. This update prioritizes personalized, proactive financial content, delivering insights into Northern Trust's asset servicing and wealth management directly to users' feeds, thereby enabling faster market decisions. The shift emphasizes mobile-first, scannable formats from credible publishers to keep investors informed on key metrics and strategic developments without needing to actively search.

feed.title: (GSEE) as a Liquidity Pulse for Institutional Tactics
feed.summary: This article analyzes Goldman Sachs Marketbeta Emerging Markets Equity Etf (NASDAQ: GSEE) with a focus on its liquidity as a pulse for institutional tactics. It highlights a near-term neutral sentiment amidst mid and long-term strength, suggesting a stall at resistance. The report provides detailed AI-generated trading strategies including position, momentum breakout, and risk hedging, along with multi-timeframe signal analysis.

feed.title: FactSet appoints Joshua Warren CFO as Helen Shan departs
feed.summary: FactSet has appointed Joshua Warren as its new Chief Financial Officer, effective immediately. Warren previously served as FactSet's Senior Vice President, Head of Investor Relations and Treasurer. He succeeds Helen Shan, who is departing from her position.

feed.title: Delta CEO Ed Bastian sparks backlash after revealing what’s really driving sky-high ticket prices
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines CEO Ed Bastian is facing criticism after suggesting the airline might not lower ticket prices even if fuel costs decline, aiming to boost margins. This follows a period of rising airfares due to increased jet fuel costs caused by the ongoing conflict in Iran, which has disrupted global oil supplies. Travelers are expressing anger online, accusing airlines of price gouging, while other carriers like United are also raising fares significantly and plan to keep them elevated.

feed.title: Altria Group Inc. stock (US02209S1033): Why Google Discover changes matter more now for tobacco inve
feed.summary: Google's 2026 Discover Core Update is revolutionizing how investors receive financial news, particularly for companies like Altria Group Inc. (NYSE:MO). This update delivers proactive, mobile-first insights on Altria's performance, smokeless product growth, and dividend strength directly to users' feeds, offering a faster edge on market trends without requiring a manual search.
